title: Red Hat Security Advisory: libssh security update
overview:
An update for libssh is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.6 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: libssh security update

An update for libssh is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.6 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for libssh is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.6 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
libssh-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.src.rpm
libssh-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.i686.rpm
libssh-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.x86_64.rpm
libssh-config-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.noarch.rpm
libssh-debuginfo-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.i686.rpm
libssh-debuginfo-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.x86_64.rpm
libssh-debugsource-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.i686.rpm
libssh-debugsource-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.x86_64.rpm
libssh-devel-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.i686.rpm
libssh-devel-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.x86_64.rpm
libssh-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.s390x.rpm
libssh-debuginfo-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.s390x.rpm
libssh-debugsource-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.s390x.rpm
libssh-devel-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.s390x.rpm
libssh-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.ppc64le.rpm
libssh-debuginfo-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.ppc64le.rpm
libssh-debugsource-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.ppc64le.rpm
libssh-devel-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.ppc64le.rpm
libssh-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.aarch64.rpm
libssh-debuginfo-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.aarch64.rpm
libssh-debugsource-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.aarch64.rpm
libssh-devel-0.10.4-15.el9_6.1.aarch64.rpm

CVE-2025-5987: A flaw was found in libssh when using the ChaCha20 cipher with the OpenSSL library. If an attacker manages to exhaust the heap space, this error is not detected and may lead to libssh using a partially initialized cipher context. This occurs because the OpenSSL error code returned aliases with the SSH_OK code, resulting in libssh not properly detecting the error returned by the OpenSSL library. This issue can lead to undefined behavior, including compromised data confidentiality and integrity or crashes.
